acceptance_targets: [chapter_13-craft-001] From snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:429 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:679, each major beat must introduce a new consequence or action rather than another paraphrase of the same thesis; after Tomas's line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:523, the route/path/access idea is stated explicitly no more than once, and the closing paragraph ends on a concrete image or action instead of a generalized moral summary.

[chapter_13-prose-001] In the revised chapter, the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:185, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:617 no longer repeat 'There it was' or the same negative-triad sentence shape more than once total, and each beat is distinguishable on the page by a different sensory or kinetic trigger.

[FBR-001] Pass if a read of snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5911-6019 shows each speaker turn changing action, leverage, or resource control, with no run of three consecutive speeches devoted mainly to abstract thematic framing. Fail if readers can skip large parts of 5919-6019 without losing scene action because the passage is still restating ideas the novel has already established.

[FBR-006] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5891-5895 makes Tomas's danger legible without using 'went still/went flat' and without flattening him into generic quiet menace. Fail if the revision still depends on a stock freeze response instead of a reaction that belongs to Tomas alone.

findings.acceptance_test: From snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:429 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:679, each major beat must introduce a new consequence or action rather than another paraphrase of the same thesis; after Tomas's line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:523, the route/path/access idea is stated explicitly no more than once, and the closing paragraph ends on a concrete image or action instead of a generalized moral summary.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps restating its central insight that sex, access, class, and wonder were entangled after the confrontation has already made that clear. Mina's interior commentary and the private-room fallout scene repeatedly translate the same truth into thesis language, which reduces consequence into explanation instead of letting the stripped bed, packed bag, and Tomas's boundary carry the damage.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten or cut the most interpretive summary beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:223, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:429, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:523, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:673, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:679. Keep one decisive articulation of the route/use/class truth, then let the later beats advance through material consequence: the stripped mattress, the folded sheet, Tomas refusing the bed, the badge on the bunk, and Mina's bodily reaction to those objects.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised chapter, the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:185, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:617 no longer repeat 'There it was' or the same negative-triad sentence shape more than once total, and each beat is distinguishable on the page by a different sensory or kinetic trigger.
findings.problem: A visible recognition formula recurs three times at key turns: 'There it was' followed by clipped negative triads such as 'Not comfort. Not theater. Just...'. Because it appears in the chapter's highest-pressure moments, it stops reading as deliberate patterning and starts reading as reusable template, flattening the prose where the scene should feel most singular.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the recognition beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:185, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:617 so they do not share the same launch phrase or the same 'Not ... Not ... Just ...' architecture. At least two of those beats should land through scene-specific image, motion, or bodily sensation rather than abstract labeling.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a read of snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5911-6019 shows each speaker turn changing action, leverage, or resource control, with no run of three consecutive speeches devoted mainly to abstract thematic framing. Fail if readers can skip large parts of 5919-6019 without losing scene action because the passage is still restating ideas the novel has already established.
findings.problem: The bat-lab confrontation starts paraphrasing the novel's own thesis instead of letting the fight keep changing leverage. Rhea, Imogen, and Tomas all get strong lines, but the sequence piles up explicit formulations about public claim, ugly liability, purity, human exploitation, and the eel as 'corporate trash' until the scene reads partly like a position paper on itself. The book's central arguments are already legible; this chapter weakens them by naming them too often.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5911-5928, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5939-5954, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6005-6019 so the argument advances through concrete next-step pressure rather than successive abstract summaries. Keep at most one of the explicit thesis lines in each cluster and convert the others into tactical conflict: who copies the pages, who calls counsel, who withholds gear, who leaves, who refuses camp publicity, or what material consequence lands next in the room.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5891-5895 makes Tomas's danger legible without using 'went still/went flat' and without flattening him into generic quiet menace. Fail if the revision still depends on a stock freeze response instead of a reaction that belongs to Tomas alone.
findings.problem: Full-book recurring-construction finding: the default-stillness shorthand appears in five chapters, and this instance should be replaced. 'Tomas went still' lands in the middle of a confrontation already loaded with his class shame, suspended route, and anger; the shorthand mutes a scene that otherwise knows how to make him dangerously particular.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5891-5895, REPLACE the stillness beat with a Tomas-specific danger signal rooted in his style-bible profile: quieter meanness, a mechanical or bodily precision, or some action that shows he is crossing over without defaulting to stock immobility language.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's uncomfortable overlaps: desire entangled with access, wonder contaminated by biotech history, class need shaping erotic choices, and ecological harm rendered at creature scale. When a scene sits on the edge between restraint and retreat, keep the pressure visible through bodies, residue, changed behavior, or social cost. If an exact detail would make the material more embarrassing, more sensual, or more morally compromising, that is usually the detail to keep.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, ecological damage, class shame, or moral compromise are softened into tasteful fog at the moment they should bite, the scene has failed and must be rewritten at higher specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms should signal deliberate emphasis, institutional performance, or a character-specific formality shift.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compression and dilation aggressively: single-scene nocturnes, comic paperwork chapters, quiet survey chapters, domestic weather chapters, confrontational set pieces, and aftermath chapters should sit beside each other without repeating the same rhythm two chapters in a row.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, coastal, and exact without brochure prettiness; scientific and bureaucratic terms may appear when the characters would think or speak through them, but they should stay embodied by consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Mina Cordero, with free-indirect access tight enough to track bodily desire, shame, and observational obsession without collapsing into confessional summary
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple sentence music that can hold humidity, rot, and erotic charge, then cut hard into blunt compression at moments of humiliation, procedural friction, or ecological damage.
